seo.title: Aalanguyil Koovum Rayyil Lyrics Parthiban Kanavu
seo.description: Full Aalanguyil songs lyrics, Parthiban Kanavu Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Kabilan, Music: Vidyasagar, Singer(s): Harini.
seo.keywords: Kabilan, Parthiban Kanavu, Vidyasagar, Harini, Aalanguyil full lyrics, Parthiban Kanavu songs lyrics, Aalanguyil lyrics snippets, Aalanguyil WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Aalanguyil lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Immerse yourself in the serene melodies of Aalanguyil Koovum Rayyil from the movie Parthiban Kanavu. This enchanting song, brought to life by Harini's soulful voice and Vidyasagar's masterful composition, captures the essence of tranquility and devotion. Experience the harmonious blend of lyrics by Kabilan and the captivating visuals featuring Srikanth and Sneha.
stanzaMeanings: The koel bird sings in the evening, creating a melodious atmosphere.
What great penance did you perform, Yashoda, to be called 'Mother' by the omnipresent divine?
The koel bird sings in the evening, and everything turns into music, dear child.
Under the banyan tree, I sing a love song that resonates in the theater, dear child.
The koel bird sings in the evening, and everything turns into music, dear child, dear child.
When the cellphone rings like a bird's song, even if we live far apart, we stay connected.
Amidst the smoke of cigarettes, like a finger, life passes momentarily, the sixth finger.
Shyness is the first desire expressed by femininity.
The mustache is uniquely mine, while the hair is like a child's.
Under the banyan tree, I sing a love song that resonates in the theater, dear child.
The Thirukkural is a poetic couplet that provides profound meaning; when both recite it together, it brings happiness.
The moonlit night bathes the goddess, who grows and fades like a white shadow.
In the mirror, I see myself, but it reflects you.
Love is expressed through musical notes, creating a harmonious melody.
In our four eyes, a single dream appears.
